name: UniDoor
subtitle: Pre-hung steel door for insulated panel systems.
shortDescription: Australian engineered and pre-hung for fast, easy installation. DDA compatible, airtight, durable and built for performance in cleanrooms, insulated panel rooms and steel frame buildings.
longDescription: Ready for Installation – The Versatile Steel Door for Insulated Panel Rooms, Cleanrooms, and Steel Frame Buildings. DDA Compatible.Engineered in Australia, the Motisan Steel Clad door is designed with a pre-hung construction that makes installation straightforward and hassle-free. Whether you’re outfitting a cleanroom, insulated panel room, or steel frame building, our door delivers exceptional performance, durability, and ease of installation—all while ensuring DDA compatibility for accessible building design.

features.content: Pre-hung design for quick and easy installation
features.explain: Our door comes pre-hung on a box section frame, ensuring a smooth, integrated installation process. With this ready-for-installation design, you enjoy a quicker setup and a seamless finish, minimizing downtime on your project.
Built as a high-performance steel clad door, the door is crafted to serve as both a steel clad and steel clad solution, delivering exceptional durability and security for any environment.
Featuring a rebate door leaf design with premium rubber-plastic seals and an automatic drop-down bottom seal, our door maintains excellent airtight integrity—ideal for controlled environments.
Designed with DDA compatibility in mind, the Motisan Steel Clad door ensures your building meets accessibility requirements and provides an inclusive environment for all users.

Enjoy a long-lasting, low-maintenance finish with UV-resistant powder coating that resists fading. The sleek design is complemented by a double-layer tempered glass view window for added style and functionality.

downloads.title: 3 Side Frame Internal Door Installation Instruction

whyChoose: At Motisan, we are committed to delivering high-quality, Australian-engineered solutions that not only meet but exceed industry standards. With features like a ready-for-installation pre-hung design and DDA compatibility, our door ensures a secure, efficient, and accessible solution for your facility. Whether upgrading a cleanroom, outfitting an insulated panel room, or constructing a new steel frame building, the Motisan Steel Clad door is built to perform and designed to last.

seo.title: UniDoor | Pre-hung Steel Door for Insulated Panel Systems
seo.description: Australian engineered pre-hung steel insulated panel doors for cleanrooms, cold rooms and industrial buildings.
